debug_info.goal:
w : Nat
x y : BitVec w
⊢ (x = y) = (BitVec.beq w x y = true)

proof:
by
    apply propext
    constructor
    · intro h; subst h
      suffices ∀ n, beq.go x x n = true from this (w - 1)
      intro n; induction n with
      | zero => simp [beq.go]
      | succ n ih => simp [beq.go, ih]
    · intro h
      apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq
      intro i hi
      suffices ∀ n, beq.go x y n = true → ∀ i, (w - 1) - n ≤ i → i ≤ w - 1 → x.getLsbD i = y.getLsbD i from this (w - 1) h i (by omega) (by omega)
      intro n; induction n with
      | zero =>
        intro h i hi1 hi2
        simp [beq.go] at h
        have : i = w - 1 := by omega
        subst this; exact h
      | succ n ih =>
        intro h i hi1 hi2
        simp [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true] at h
        obtain ⟨hhead, htail⟩ := h
        by_cases hc : i = (w - 1) - (n + 1)
        · subst hc; exact hhead
        · exact ih htail i (by omega) hi2

    · intro h

      suffices ∀ n, beq.go x y n = true → ∀ i, (w - 1) - n ≤ i → i ≤ w - 1 → x.getLsbD i = y.getLsbD i from this (w - 1) h i (by omega) (by omega)
      intro n; induction n with
      | zero =>
        intro h i hi1 hi2
        simp [beq.go] at h
        have : i = w - 1 := by omega
        subst this; exact h
      | succ n ih =>
